purpose: Track the shared Platinum support surfaces Guardians should inherit as naturally as Aurora: pilot sign-in, score save and failure reporting, replay and video-prep language, pilot-card identity, and game-owned arcade-music wiring.
requiredPackPhrases: Shared Platinum sign-in, score, replay, bug-report, music, and release shell support
capabilityTargets: pilot sign-in and top-score claim language should be game-aware
online score failure prompts should be game-aware and bug-report ready
replay and future video-posting language should be framed as shared platform support, not Aurora-only behavior
the game should advertise its own arcade music override while still using Platinum controls
